calendar.matters:
Petition To Compel An Account
Off Calendar Feb-20-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Albert Kun in pro per.
Mr. Kun reported that Lynn Nightinggale was unable to complete the accounting.
The accounting is allowed but not approved. The Petition to compel an account is taken off calendar.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, Bailiff: Deputy Handa.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT

Petition To Compel An Account
Off Calendar Dec-19-2007 Continued To Feb-20-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Albert Kun in Pro Per. Duane Leonard for the Petitioner.

Mr. Kun requested a continuance to February 20, 2008, which the Court granted.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR #11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Lewis.

Off Calendar Jul-30-2007 Continued To Oct-01-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Duane Leonard appearing for Dean Baily, Albert Kun, Petitioner
Mr. Kun states that all parties has stipulated to one more amended accounting. There are three(3) accounts set up by Morgan Stanley, three stocks and one bond. The Court suggest that Mr. Kun get a paralegal to prepare the accounting, oppose to a CPA, and that this may even be cheaper. There is also the issue concerning a small portion of assets still left in the estate. All matters to contiuned until 10/01/07.
COMMISSIONER: DOROTHY L. MCMATH, REPORTER:KAYT BERSAMIN CSR#11722, CLRK lARRISA DOTSON, BALIFF F. SMITH
